approver: Approver — verified each against cdec.v RTL 2026-06-09

waivers.structural_basis: cdec.v:113/168/234 `default: illegal=1` arms select RV64-only (SUBW/ADDW) and F/D (C.FLD/FSD) compressed encodings, unreachable in the RV32IMC target ISA scope (ADR-0002).
waivers.stimulus_considered: all RV32IMC-legal compressed instrs driven incl c.ebreak/reserved; RV64/FP encodings are out of ISA scope

waivers.structural_basis: rd_rs1_p={2'b01,rd_rs1_3} (cdec.v:45) — compressed reg x8-15 -> bits[4:3]=01 hardwired — RTL-hardwired constant, cannot toggle.
waivers.stimulus_considered: full compressed immediate range driven; these bits are RTL constants

waivers.structural_basis: rs2_p={2'b01,rs2_3} (cdec.v:46) — bits[4:3]=01 hardwired — RTL-hardwired constant, cannot toggle.
waivers.stimulus_considered: full compressed immediate range driven; these bits are RTL constants

waivers.stimulus_considered: full compressed immediate range driven; these bits are RTL constants

waivers.stimulus_considered: full compressed immediate range driven; these bits are RTL constants
